title: Bujji Bedtime Stories
description: Soft, soothing bedtime stories to help little ones drift off to sleep. Gentle original tales — a sleepy star, a moon that lost its blanket — told in a warm, calming voice with soft music. No loud sounds, no scary bits. Ages 2-8. New story every week.
author: Bujji

episodes.title: The Star That Couldn't Stop Yawning
episodes.description: High above a sleeping village, one little star just can't stop yawning… and the kind moon knows exactly what to do. A soft, slow bedtime story to help your little one settle down and drift off to sleep. Ages 2-8, calming voice + gentle music, no scary bits.

episodes.title: Bujji and the Moon's Lost Blanket
episodes.description: Bujji and the Moon's Lost Blanket. A soft, slow bedtime story to help your little one settle down and drift off to sleep. Ages 2-8, calming voice and gentle music, no scary bits. Follow Bujji Bedtime Stories for a new sleepy tale every week. Sweet dreams.
